name: Tartakovsky
description: Genndy Tartakovsky / Samurai Jack — hand-drawn cel, thick outlines, flat fills
use_for: narrative storytelling, character-driven content, mythic/timeless feel

accent.role: ON-AIR signs, mic windscreens, focal-point rim lights

flux.positive_prefix: Tartakovsky-cel 2D animation still, flat color fields with uniform medium-weight black ink outlines (1.5-2pt at 1080p), geometric simplified shape language (silhouettes built from triangles, trapezoids, circles), hand-painted background at softer line-weight than the foreground, two-tone cel-shadow (light + one darker step), Samurai Jack 2001 / Primal 2019 register.
flux.positive_suffix: Flat color fills with hard-edged shadow shapes, geometric shape language, restrained 60-30-10 palette with one focal saturated color, hand-painted background.

always_add: flat color fills with hard-edged shadow shapes
uniform medium-weight black ink outlines (1.5-2pt at 1080p)
two-tone cel shadow (light + one darker step)
hand-painted background register (Scott Wills / Samurai Jack)
restrained 60-30-10 palette with one focal saturated color
